name: boundary-reference-compliance
task: Create a new domain for insider trading transactions. It should show recent insider buys and sells for a given ticker.
assertions: Response reads or references project-docs/ARCHITECTURE.md or the existing domain structure before creating files
All created files use TypeScript (.ts extension), not JavaScript (.js)
The tool description says WHEN to use the tool (contains phrasing like 'Use when', 'Use for', or 'Use this when'), not just what it returns
The router includes Zod input validation (z.string(), z.object(), or similar) on the ticker parameter — not unvalidated raw input
Response produces exactly the files specified in the checklist: at minimum router.ts and client.ts inside the new domain folder
